title: Read the catalogue and produce a bubble inventory artifact
reason: The user provided a catalogue (likely proposals/index.md), but we lack a complete, human-readable inventory of all files and their purposes. This baseline is necessary before building anything new.
planned_changes: Read proposals/index.md to understand the catalogue contents
Read world/room_state.json and world/avatar_state.json for state context
Create bubble_inventory.md listing every file, its type, and its role
Append a log entry in logs/2026-06-11.log summarizing the inventory creation
risk: low — all actions are reads or new file creations; no existing files are modified or deleted
checks: bubble_inventory.md exists in the bubble root
All known files from the bubble context are listed with accurate descriptions
No existing files were touched or altered
